# Three-day city guide contract

| Day | Area | Route shape | Required checks | Fallback |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Arrival district | airport/station → hotel → nearby walk | arrival delay, check-in, dinner hours | hotel-area indoor stop |
| 2 | Historic core | one compact walking loop | opening day, timed entry, mobility, meal buffer | museum or covered market |
| 3 | Waterfront and departure | hotel → one priority stop → terminal | luggage storage, transfer time, weather | direct terminal transfer |

Every opening hour, fare, reservation rule, and transfer time must carry a current source URL and retrieval date. The final artifact must label estimates and preserve at least one hour of departure buffer beyond the provider minimum.
